text.title: PM Tools Comparison Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of PM Tools Comparison, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: PM Tools Comparison — clean application
example.note: ptc-2026-Q2 — Jira/Linear/ClickUp PoC'd; Linear wins weighted total 4.05; TCO Linear 43k vs Jira 55k; dissent from Marko captured.
